name: Jeen Design System
description: A living, AI-queryable design system that is also the portfolio. Design decisions exist as structured data — visible through a dashboard, queryable through an agent.

routes.description: Main portfolio landing page — assembles all homepage sections
Public dashboard — visual documentation of all design tokens, components, and principles
Individual diary / article pages rendered from markdown content

sections.label: Hero
sections.description: Full-viewport opening section with headline, CTAs, social links, scroll indicator, and Pocky mascot

sections.label: Playground
sections.description: Experiment cards grid and diary entry list

content.diary: dynamic — loaded from src/content/diary/ via getCollection

sections.label: About
sections.description: About section with bio, skills, and profile card with stats

sections.label: Work
sections.description: Selected projects table — expandable rows showing role, tools, and year

projects.title: From Dead to Living: Building a Design System with AI
Design System × Marketplace — from fragmented to unified

components.label: Header
components.description: Fixed navigation bar with scroll-aware style change and mobile menu toggle

components.label: Footer
components.description: CTA band with email capture, copy-to-clipboard, social links, and site credits

components.label: TweaksPanel
components.description: Edit-mode overlay panel activated by postMessage from parent frame; exposes accent color, work style, and scroll indicator toggles

components.label: Layout
components.description: Global page shell — all pages must use this. Injects tokens.css, homepage.css, and Vercel Analytics.

components.label: Badge
components.description: Label/tag pill component. Maps variant prop to existing homepage.css badge classes — no new CSS.

components.label: Button
components.description: CTA button component. Renders as <a> when href is provided, <button> otherwise. Maps to existing hero CTA classes.

components.label: Card
components.description: Outer card container. Renders as <a> when href is provided, <div> otherwise. Inner content via slot — no internal template imposed.

components.label: Link

surfaces.default: light — box-shadow underline, floods dark on hover, yellow text
surfaces.subtle: light — --fg-secondary, plain underline, darkens on hover
surfaces.on-dark: dark — box-shadow underline, floods light on hover, dark text
surfaces.nav: dark — pill button shape, yellow on hover
surfaces.back: dark — muted color, white on hover, no underline
surfaces.footer-nav: dark — plain nav item, white on hover, no underline

components.description: Unified link component mapping 6 semantic variants to existing link classes. One new class added: .link-subtle (homepage.css).

entries.title: I Built My Portfolio in 2 Days (and You Can Too)

link-tokens.note: No isolated link tokens — links use existing surface tokens. Deprecated fg-link/fg-nav-link replaced by Link component variants.

deprecated-foregrounds.reason: Replaced by global <a> box-shadow underline pattern and the Link component variant system

border.note: Pick by surface: border-primary/subtle on light, border-on-dark on --bg-dark, border-accent for highlights

shadow.note: Hard offset shadows define the doodle/comic aesthetic. Soft shadows for elevated modals.

rules.useSemanticFirst: Always prefer semantic tokens (--fg-primary) over primitives (--color-black) in product code
rules.noHardcodedValues: Never hardcode hex colors, font names, spacing, shadows, or border radii if a token exists
rules.noNewTokens: Do not add CSS variables outside of tokens.css
rules.a11yLightSurface: --fg-tertiary fails WCAG AA at small sizes on light bg — use --fg-secondary minimum
rules.a11yDarkSurface: Only --fg-on-dark-* tokens on --bg-dark. Never gray-500/700/900 on dark.
rules.a11yYellowSurface: Only --color-black on yellow — all other values fail contrast

stylesheets.purpose: All design tokens — single source of truth
All homepage and shared component styles
DS dashboard page styles — not for use in product pages

capabilities.label: Public design system dashboard
capabilities.description: Visual documentation of all tokens, components, and principles at /design-system

capabilities.label: Diary / writing
capabilities.description: Markdown-driven articles at /diary/[slug] — thoughts on design, AI, and building in public

capabilities.label: Ask Pocky — AI design agent
capabilities.description: Chat interface to query the design system, work history, and design process via Pocky (AI agent)

capabilities.label: Component sandbox
capabilities.description: Interactive playground for composing and testing design system components in real time

capabilities.label: Edit-mode tweaks panel
capabilities.description: Postmessage-activated overlay for live customisation of accent color, work section style, and scroll indicator — used in iframe edit contexts

capabilities.label: Machine-readable system.json
capabilities.description: This file — structured, relational representation of the design system for AI querying, tooling, and automation

mascot.name: Pocky
mascot.role: AI agent and co-owner of the design system
mascot.description: Pocky is Jeen's cat-turned-AI-agent. The interface for querying the design system. Knows everything.

discrepancies.title: --fg-tertiary used on light bg — 5 WCAG AA violations
discrepancies.body: Several classes used --fg-tertiary (#9A9A90, ~2.6:1) for readable text on light surfaces, which fails WCAG AA. Fixed: .play-card-desc, .diary-read-time, .about-card-role, .about-stat-label, .pg-eyebrow → --fg-secondary (#3A3A35, ~9:1).

discrepancies.title: Nav CTA shadow: shadow-lg → shadow-sm
discrepancies.body: DS preview showed smaller 2px offset shadow on nav CTA. Project had 5px (shadow-lg). Decision: use shadow-sm (2px default, 3px hover) — proportionate for a small nav element.

discrepancies.title: Card hover lift: translateY(-3px) → -2px
discrepancies.body: DS spec defines 2px lift on card hover. Project had 3px. Decision: reduced to -2px to match DS spec.

discrepancies.title: Hero badge: keep ghost style over solid yellow (DS spec)
discrepancies.body: DS spec shows hero role badge as solid yellow pill. Live project uses ghost style (transparent bg, gray border). Decision: keep ghost — it feels less heavy in the hero context.

discrepancies.title: Ad-hoc link styles unified into Link component + global pattern
discrepancies.body: 6 ad-hoc link styles (nav-link, hero-social-link, footer-link, footer-contact-link, social-pill, article-back-link) were inconsistent and undocumented. Replaced with global <a> box-shadow underline pattern and Link component with 6 semantic variants. Deprecated --fg-link, --fg-link-hover, --fg-nav-link, --fg-nav-link-hover tokens.

discrepancies.title: Diary page styles not formally in DS: code blocks, HR
discrepancies.body: The diary page uses inverted code blocks (--bg-dark bg, --fg-on-dark-primary text) and styled HRs (gray-300 border) not defined in the DS token set. Consider formalising these as article-specific token aliases.

discrepancies.title: Ghost + coming-soon Badge variants not in DS spec
discrepancies.body: Playground section uses ghost-style category labels and coming-soon badges not defined in the DS badge spec. Currently implemented as one-off CSS in homepage.css. Consider adding ghost and coming-soon as official Badge variants with tokens.

discrepancies.title: Doodle illustration set incomplete
discrepancies.body: DS spec calls for hand-drawn SVG doodles as a decorative layer (1–3 per section, black line art). Currently only feather_copy.svg and feather_check.svg are in use. Full doodle set to be provided by Jeen.
